_documentation: Field names and nesting follow Genius Sports public Fixtures API v2 / entity descriptions (Confluence). Values are synthetic.

_where_to_find.country_or_region: Locality — attached to Competition and Fixture (and used for competitor nationality in other contexts). Filter localities e.g. /v2/localities?filter=code:ESP. Locality types include Country, FirstOrderAdministrativeRegion, ConstituentCountry, World, NonGeographic, etc.
_where_to_find.gender: genderType on Fixture; Competition also defines genderType for which competitors may participate. Ingestion examples may use gender on proposed Competition.
_where_to_find.youth_competition: youth (boolean) on Competition entity — indicates a youth competition (not a specific age band like U-21).
_where_to_find.under21_or_age_band: Public Competition docs emphasize genderType, youth, and naming rules (e.g. 'Women' postfix). Explicit U-21 / U-19 may appear in competition name or sport-specific metadataProperties — verify with your Genius integration contact.

example_fixture_like_public_docs.name: Tampa Bay Buccaneers v Dallas Cowboys
